summary: US-040 implementation already complete. Volumetric point cloud generator with 5 shape types (sphereVolume, shell, torusVolume, noiseLattice, spiralField) using seeded PRNG for determinism. Integrated into pointCloud system with seed-driven shape selection, lattice snapping, and softness transforms. All 55 tests pass (31 unit + 24 integration), TypeScript compiles cleanly, and production build succeeds.
